DocsHelper = op.TDResources.mod.DocsHelper.DocsHelper

*�����������������I# me - this DAT
# scriptOp - the OP which is cooking

# press 'Setup Parameters' in the OP to call this function to re-create the parameters
def setupParameters(scriptOp):
	page = scriptOp.appendCustomPage('Custom Attributes')
	p = page.appendDAT('Attribs', label='Attribute Table')
	return

# called whenever custom pulse parameter is pushed
def onPulse(par):
	return

def cook(scriptOp):
	scriptOp.clear()
	#scriptOp.copy(scriptOp.inputs[0])
	attribTbl = scriptOp.par.Attribs.eval()
	
	for i in range(1,attribTbl.numRows):
		name = attribTbl[i,'name']
		type = attribTbl[i,'type']
		default = attribTbl[i,'default'].val
		
		if type == 'Prim':
			scriptOp.primAttribs.create(name,eval(default))
		elif type == 'Vert':
			scriptOp.vertexAttribs.create(name,eval(default))
		else:
			scriptOp.pointAttribs.create(name,eval(default))
	return
